title: Environment Foundation
text:
Decision made by the Charity Commission on 24 January 2003.

The commission considered an application from Environment Foundation for registration as a charity. The commission concluded that with some changes to its objects, the organisation would be established for exclusively charitable purposes and could register as a charity.

This decision is significant because it recognises a new charitable purpose of the promotion of sustainable development for the benefit of the public.
description: Decision of the Charity Commission on Environment Foundation.
